text_block_list.text:
I inform Narita Brian of some sudden changes to
her training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: I was just thinking you took that pretty well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Who do you take me for?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If there's good reason for making a change, I'll
accept it. That's only natural.
choice_data_list: I haven't even explained the reason yet...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...You haven't said anything that doesn't make
sense to me before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Your actions always lead to the desired outcome.
I assumed that would be the case this time as well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't make me start regretting it now, all right?

Narita Brian seems to be satisfied with the results
of her training.
